narrative:
Marlboro township has 3,085 registered voters, with 45.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.6 percentage points.
